titleStmt.title: SII 18.216: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 216. (B.K. No. 122 of 1933-34.) BIJĀPUR, BIJAPUR TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Pillar at the south entrance of Ark-killah.

summary.p: This inscription referring itself to the reign of Siṁghaṇadēva is dated in Śaka 1156, Jaya, Vaiśākha śu. ūrṇimā, Vaḍḍavāra (Saturday), corresponding to A.D. 1234, April 15, Saturday. At the end of the record, the grant is stated to have been made on the occasion of a lunar eclipse. As there was no lunar eclipse on the date cited, it apparently refers to the lunar eclipse which took place in the previous month i.e., on March 17, Friday.

It registers a remission of taxes on certain articles for the worship and offerings of god Narasiṁhadēva of Vijayāpura (modern Bijapur) also called Dakshiṇa-Vāraṇasi when Tikkarasa was the Sarvādhikāri of Taddavāḍi, Heḍa and Kaṇabaḍe provinces. The donor was Mahāpasāyita, Suṁkādhikāri Viṁchuvadēvarasa.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
paṁcatrisūtrasamayāprabhāmukhyamaparājana sēva
tē śrīrasiṁhabhaktyā paścimē vijayāpurē svasti śrīmaThis verse is faulty.
tu yādavanārāyaṇa pratāpacakravarti siṁghaṇadēva
rājyābhyudaya pravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ
saluttamire sakavaruṣa 1156 neya jayasaṁ
vatsarada vaisākha suddha puṁṇame vaḍḍavāradaṁdu śrīma
dakṣiṇavāraṇāsi vijayāpurada śrīnarasiṁ
hadēvarige koṁḍeyara gaṁḍa tikkarasanu taddavāḍi heḍa kaṇabaḍe
yaṁtu mūṟunāḍanu tribhōgābhyaṁtaraṁ sarvvādhikāra
vaṁ māḍuttaviralu yivara śrīmanumahāpasāyitaṁ
suṁkādhikāri viṁcuvadēvara(ṁ)saru śrīmatu
dakṣiṇavaraṇāsi vijayapurada śrīnarasiṁhadēvara
yaṁgabhōga raṁgabhōga caitrapayitrake yeṁ
du 50 Ettuyaḍake yalla meḷasu yarisina
paṭṭakarppūra bhūsa vidaḷa mukhya yāva bhaṁḍava hēṟi
taṁdu māṟidaḍaṁ suṁka parihāra mattaṁ yā
dēvara kaṁmata yāva vūrali māḍidaḍaṁ Ā bhatta bhaṁ
ḍi Ettinali baṁdaṁtahāvakke suṁkabāhirasīme Eṁ
denabāradu mattaṁ Ā dēvara vastu Eṁme yettu kudu
re jīvadana yēnumāṟidaḍaṁ māṟikoṁḍaḍaṁ suṁkapa
rihāra mataṁ dēvara pūjārigaḷu Āva tōṭava māḍi
bāḍu kāya māṟidaḍaṁ suṁkaparihāra yeṁ
du sōmagrahaṇadalu sarvvabādheparihāravaṁ mā
ḍi biṭṭaru maṁgaḷa mahāśrī śrīśrī mattaṁ śrīnarasiṁ
hvadēvara Āḷkeya hosahaḷḷilu kuḍi
bhattavaṁduetu kelavāḍakuḍikeya kaṟi
saha śrīnarasiṁhadēvaradu maṁgaḷaṁ
Digital edition of SII 18.216 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
